import _objectSpread from"C:/Users/abhi9/Downloads/healthcare-platform-module1/healthcare-platform/frontend/node_modules/@babel/runtime/helpers/esm/objectSpread2.js";import api from'./api';const appointmentService={// Patient — book appointment
